name: colloquial-pareto
description: Pareto chart — bars sorted descending + cumulative percentage line with dual axis
messages: Create a Pareto chart of revenue by subcategory
rubric: A Pareto chart has bars sorted descending by value + a cumulative percentage line on a secondary y-axis. Model should use aggregate, joinaggregate, window (cumulative sum), and calculate transforms to compute cumulative %. Must use layer with resolve.scale.y = independent for dual axis. Bars MUST be sorted by revenue descending. Cumulative line should reach 100% at the rightmost bar. FAIL if no cumulative line, bars are unsorted, or only a plain bar chart.
